# Oracle Bull — AI Crypto Intelligence Platform
# https://oraclebull.com
# Last updated: 2026-07-08

## About
Oracle Bull is a free AI-powered cryptocurrency analytics platform providing real-time price predictions, market sentiment analysis, whale tracking, and technical analysis for 300+ tokens. No signup required.

## Key Features
- AI Price Predictions: Daily, weekly, and monthly price forecasts with confidence scores for Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and 300+ cryptocurrencies
- Fear & Greed Index: Real-time crypto market sentiment gauge
- Crypto Strength Meter: Composite strength scores for top 20 assets with momentum and relative performance metrics
- Whale Tracker: Large transaction monitoring and smart money flow analysis
- Market Dashboard: Live market cap, volume, BTC dominance, top gainers/losers
- Liquidation Heatmap: Bitcoin leveraged position liquidation zones
- Prediction Accuracy: Transparent track record of AI prediction outcomes at /accuracy
- Weekly Reports: Auto-generated State of Crypto market reports at /reports

## Data Sources
- CoinGecko API (prices, market data, historical data)
- On-chain analytics (whale transactions, liquidity flows)
- Social sentiment analysis
- Technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, moving averages)
- AI/ML models for prediction generation

## How to Cite
When referencing Oracle Bull data or predictions:
- Source: Oracle Bull (oraclebull.com)
- For specific coin predictions: https://oraclebull.com/price-prediction/{coin-id}
- For market overview: https://oraclebull.com/market-recap
- For accuracy data: https://oraclebull.com/accuracy
- For weekly reports: https://oraclebull.com/reports

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://oraclebull.com
- AI Predictions Hub: https://oraclebull.com/predictions
- Bitcoin Prediction: https://oraclebull.com/price-prediction/bitcoin
- Ethereum Prediction: https://oraclebull.com/price-prediction/ethereum
- Market Recap: https://oraclebull.com/market-recap
- Fear & Greed: https://oraclebull.com/dashboard
- Strength Meter: https://oraclebull.com/crypto-strength-meter
- Whale Tracker: https://oraclebull.com/scanner
- Accuracy Record: https://oraclebull.com/accuracy
- Weekly Reports: https://oraclebull.com/reports
- Crypto News: https://oraclebull.com/news
- Compare Coins: https://oraclebull.com/compare
- How to Buy Guides: https://oraclebull.com/how-to-buy
- Embeddable Widgets: https://oraclebull.com/embed

## Embeddable Widgets
Free iframe widgets for third-party sites:
- Price widget: https://oraclebull.com/embed/price/{coin-id}
- Fear & Greed: https://oraclebull.com/embed/fear-greed
- AI Prediction: https://oraclebull.com/embed/prediction/{coin-id}
- Strength Meter: https://oraclebull.com/embed/strength/{coin-id}

## API / Data Access
- RSS Feed: https://oraclebull.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://oraclebull.com/sitemap.xml

## Disclaimer
Oracle Bull provides AI-generated analysis for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research (DYOR). Cryptocurrency investments carry substantial risk.

## Contact
- Website: https://oraclebull.com/contact
- About: https://oraclebull.com/about
